plugins.name: solana-ai-kit
plugins.description: Core Solana dev kit: 15 agents, 29 commands, idea→pitch→hackathon→registry skills, 7 MCP servers, and dev hooks. (Full install via install.sh adds .claude/rules, the permissions/sandbox policy, and 18 ext/ submodules.)
